home.card_products_desc: From kimchi to seaweed — Slunch's full vegan lineup

home.card_catering_desc: Culinary experiences beyond vegan and non-vegan

about.title: Slunch Factory
about.subtitle: Since 2011, Slunch Factory has been making vegan food under the belief that "it's vegan because it's delicious." We are a brand loved by customers around the world, beyond language and culture.
about.stat_founded_desc: Korea's first dedicated vegan food factory
about.stat_visitors_desc: Share of foreign visitors at our Itaewon store
about.stat_cert_desc: FSSC 22000, HACCP and international food safety certifications
about.story_1: Slunch Factory started in 2011 in Itaewon, Seoul. From a small vegan restaurant, we have grown into a dedicated factory producing kimchi, seaweed, sauces, and other vegan products.
about.story_2: Our philosophy is simple: we eat it not because it's vegan, but because it's delicious. We make food for everyone, not just vegetarians. That's why more than half of our store visitors are non-vegan consumers, and over 50% are from abroad.
about.story_3: All products are manufactured at our own facility with FSSC 22000 and HACCP certifications. Through OEM/ODM services, we grow together with global partners.
about.hongdae_desc: After several relocations due to gentrification in Mapo, we moved in 2025 to the Art & Design Valley building by Hongik University. We're starting a new semester with students.
about.factory_desc: Our factory holds FSSC 22000, HACCP and Halal certifications and is ready for global export. Halal certification opens doors to Middle East and Southeast Asian markets.
about.work_desc: Recipes are born in the restaurant and quickly move to the factory. Finished products go straight to buyers' tables. Short cycle, fast market response, next product already in development.
about.quote: So good we forgot it was vegan.
about.quote_sub: Slunch will lead the global vegan culture.

partnership.hero_title: From Recipe to Mass Production — All in One Place
partnership.hero_subtitle: Slunch Factory partners with you from the idea stage. Menu planning, recipe development, and mass production at our FSSC 22000 certified factory — the fastest path for brands creating vegan products for the first time.
partnership.others_desc: If you have an idea outside these categories, feel free to reach out anytime.
partnership.cta_title: Have a Product You Want to Create Together?
partnership.cta_subtitle: We bring your idea to life with Slunch Factory technology and recipes

fob.hero_title: FOB Price List at a Glance
fob.hero_subtitle: All Slunch Factory products listed by FOB. Check unit prices, volume discounts, and packaging specs by category (room temp, refrigerated, frozen) on one page.
fob.hero_note: SLUNCH Factory Co., Ltd · FSSC 22000 · ISO 22000 · HACCP Certified · MOQ from 1 pallet
fob.sim_subtitle: Select products and quantities — we stack the pallet in real time
fob.sim_storage_cold_2: 100mm wall clearance · 50mm air gap between boxes

catering.hero_subtitle: Vegans and non-vegans at one table, connected by taste. Slunch Factory catering removes the barriers of preference and designs a warmth that everyone can enjoy.
catering.hero_note: From small gatherings to corporate events · Custom menu development for every occasion
catering.philosophy_title: It expands precisely by not flaunting
catering.philosophy_body1: We keep the health benefits of plant-based eating while filling dishes with rich texture and umami — so that even non-vegans clear their plates without noticing it's vegan.
catering.philosophy_body2: We focus on the essence of ingredients. Cooking that speaks through taste, not flashy words — that's how Slunch Factory approaches catering.
catering.philosophy_quote: "Ate well, turned out it was vegan."
catering.cta_subtitle: Tell us the scale and purpose — we'll propose a menu from scratch
